Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.marshall

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.marshall
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.atom
ATOM Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
Juneau @Marshalled types for the HAL (Hypertext Application Language) hypermedia format, also covered by draft-kelly-json-hal-08.
org.apache.juneau.bean.html5
HTML5 Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
Juneau @Marshalled types for the JSON:API v1.1 wire format.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonpatch
Juneau @Marshalled types for JSON Patch (RFC 6902).
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
JSON Schema Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp
Juneau @Marshalled types for the Model Context Protocol (MCP) wire format.
org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3
Swagger Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3.ui
OpenAPI UI Generator
org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807
Juneau @Marshalled beans for RFC 7807 — Problem Details for HTTP APIs (media type application/problem+json).
org.apache.juneau.bean.swagger.ui
Swagger UI Generator
org.apache.juneau.config
Configuration Support
org.apache.juneau.config.store
Configuration Storage Support
org.apache.juneau.examples.core.config.store
Configuration Store Examples
org.apache.juneau.examples.parser
Parser Examples
org.apache.juneau.examples.serializer
Serializer Examples
org.apache.juneau.http
HTTP Part Annotations
org.apache.juneau.http.classic
Predefined HTTP headers, parts, entities, resources, and responses built on the classic Apache HttpComponents API.
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header
HTTP Header Beans
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.part
HTTP Part Beans
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.response
HTTP Response Exception Beans
org.apache.juneau.httppart.bean
HTTP Part Beans
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections
Collections classes.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cp
Classpath Utilities
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart
HTTP Part Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.internal
Internal Utilities
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5
JSON5 Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
JSON-Schema Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.objecttools
Java Object Tools
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Parser API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Serializer API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) marshalling support — text/event-stream.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream
Public low-level token-streaming API (pull parser + push generator) shared by every Juneau format.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap
Swap API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.swaps
Predefined Swaps
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.utils
URL-Encoding Annotations
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic
REST Client API
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic.remote
Remote REST API
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic
Mocked REST client and supporting classes for in-JVM testing built on the classic Apache HttpClient API.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg
REST Method Argument Beans
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.beans
REST Interface Helper Classes
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug
REST Debug APIs
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.docs
API-docs mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that publish Swagger v2 and OpenAPI 3.1 spec endpoints with Swagger-UI and Redoc HTML mounts.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart
REST HTTP Parts
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.logger
REST Logging API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.rrpc
REST Remote Procedure Call API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.stats
Method exec stats utilities
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.validation
Optional Jakarta Bean Validation 3.x integration for juneau-rest-server — declarative validation of request beans via jakarta.validation.constraints.* annotations.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.widget
HTML Widget API
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall used by org.apache.juneau.bean.atom
    Class
    Description
    Marshalled
    Annotation that can be applied to classes to control how they are marshalled.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall used by org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
    Class
    Description
    ClassMeta
    A wrapper class around the Class object that provides cached information about that class.
    Marshalled
    Annotation that can be applied to classes to control how they are marshalled.
    MarshallingSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of MarshallingContext.
    Swap
    Associates ObjectSwap and Surrogate classes with POJOs and bean properties.

    Class
    Description
    AnnotationApplier
    Class used to add properties to a context builder (e.g.
    AnnotationWorkList
    A list of AnnotationWork objects.
    BasicRuntimeException
    Subclass of runtime exceptions that take in a message and zero or more arguments.
    BeanCtorApply
    Dynamically applies a @BeanCtor annotation to specified constructors.
    BeanCtorApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    BeanDictionaryList
    Represents a collection of bean classes that make up a bean dictionary.
    BeanDictionaryMap
    Represents a map of dictionary type names to bean classes that make up a bean dictionary.
    BeanIgnoreApply
    Dynamically applies a @BeanIgnore annotation to specified classes, methods, fields, or constructors.
    BeanIgnoreApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    BeanPropApply
    Dynamically applies a @BeanProp annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    BeanPropApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    BeanRegistry
    A lookup table for resolving bean types by name.
    BeanTypeApply
    Dynamically applies a @BeanType annotation to specified classes.
    BeanTypeApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    BigNumberFormat
    Supported wire formats for BigInteger and BigDecimal values.
    BinaryFormat
    Supported wire formats for byte[] values and stream-based serialization output.
    BitSetFormat
    Supported wire formats for BitSet values.
    BooleanFormat
    Supported wire formats for Boolean / boolean values.
    CalendarFormat
    Supported wire formats for Calendar values.
    ClassFormat
    Supported wire formats for Class values.
    ClassMeta
    A wrapper class around the Class object that provides cached information about that class.
    ClassMetaRuntimeException
    General class metadata runtime operation exception.
    ConfigException
    An exception that typically occurs when trying to perform an invalid operation on a configuration property.
    Context
    Base class for all Context beans.
    Context.Builder
    Builder class.
    ContextApply
    Applied to Config annotations to identify the class used to push the values into a property store.
    ContextRuntimeException
    General runtime operation exception that can occur in any of the context classes.
    ContextSession
    A one-time-use non-thread-safe object that's meant to be used once and then thrown away.
    ContextSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    CurrencyFormat
    Supported wire formats for Currency values.
    DateFormat
    Supported wire formats for Date values.
    DetailLevel
    Identifies an arbitrary detail level such as the detail of log messages.
    DurationFormat
    Supported wire formats for Duration values.
    Enablement
    Represents the enablement settings of a feature.
    EnumFormat
    Supported wire formats for Enum values.
    Example
    Identifies examples for POJOs.
    ExampleAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    ExampleApply
    Dynamically applies an @Example annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    ExampleApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    ExtendedMeta
    Superclass of all extended metadata classes.
    ExternalDocsAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    FloatFormat
    Supported wire formats for non-finite Float / Double values (NaN, +Infinity, -Infinity).
    InvalidDataConversionException
    General invalid conversion exception.
    ItemsAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    ListOperation
    Identifies how to add elements to a list.
    LocaleFormat
    Supported wire formats for Locale values.
    Marshalled
    Annotation that can be applied to classes to control how they are marshalled.
    MarshalledAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarshalledApply
    Dynamically applies a @Marshalled annotation to specified classes.
    MarshalledApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarshalledAs
    Specifies the marshalling strategy for a type annotated with @Marshalled.
    MarshalledConfig
    Annotation for specifying marshalling-only config properties defined in MarshallingContext and MarshallingTraverseContext.
    MarshalledFilter
    Filter for customizing how POJOs and beans are handled during serialization and parsing.
    MarshalledFilter.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarshalledIgnore
    Skip a type entirely during marshalling.
    MarshalledIgnoreAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarshalledIgnoreApply
    Dynamically applies a @MarshalledIgnore annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    MarshalledIgnoreApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarshalledProp
    Used to tailor how bean properties get marshalled by the framework.
    MarshalledPropAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarshalledPropApply
    Dynamically applies a @MarshalledProp annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    MarshalledPropApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarshallingContext
    Bean context.
    MarshallingContext.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarshallingContextable
    Context class for classes that use MarshallingContext objects.
    MarshallingContextable.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarshallingRecursionException
    Exception that indicates that a recursion was detected while traversing a POJO model.
    MarshallingSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of MarshallingContext.
    MarshallingSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarshallingTraverseContext
    Parent class for all classes that traverse POJOs.
    MarshallingTraverseContext.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarshallingTraverseSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    NameProperty
    Identifies a setter method or field for setting the name of a POJO as it's known by its parent object.
    NamePropertyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    NamePropertyApply
    Dynamically applies a @NameProperty annotation to specified methods or fields.
    NamePropertyApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    Nulls
    Per-property null-coercion modes consulted by parsers when an explicit null (or absent Optional) is encountered on the wire.
    ParentProperty
    Identifies a setter method or field for adding a parent reference to a child object.
    ParentPropertyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    ParentPropertyApply
    Dynamically applies a @ParentProperty annotation to specified methods or fields.
    ParentPropertyApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    PeriodFormat
    Supported wire formats for Period values.
    SchemaAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    SchemaApply
    Dynamically applies a @Schema annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    SchemaApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    SubItemsAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    Swap
    Associates ObjectSwap and Surrogate classes with POJOs and bean properties.
    SwapAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    SwapApply
    Dynamically applies a @Swap annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    SwapApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    TemporalFormat
    Supported wire formats for TemporalAccessor values.
    TimeZoneFormat
    Supported wire formats for TimeZone and ZoneId values.
    Uri
    Used to identify a class or bean property as a URI.
    UriAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    UriApply
    Dynamically applies a @Uri annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    UriApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    UriContext
    Represents a URL broken into authority/context-root/servlet-path/path-info parts.
    UriRelativity
    Identifies what relative URIs are relative to.
    UriResolution
    Identifies the possible types of URL resolution.
    UriResolver
    Class used to create absolute and root-relative URIs based on your current URI 'location' and rules about how to make such resolutions.
    UuidFormat
    Supported wire formats for UUID values.

    Class used to add properties to a context builder (e.g.
    ClassMeta
    A wrapper class around the Class object that provides cached information about that class.
    Context
    Base class for all Context beans.
    Context.Builder
    Builder class.
    ContextApply
    Applied to Config annotations to identify the class used to push the values into a property store.
    ContextSession
    A one-time-use non-thread-safe object that's meant to be used once and then thrown away.
    ContextSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarshallingContextable
    Context class for classes that use MarshallingContext objects.
    MarshallingContextable.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarshallingSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of MarshallingContext.
    MarshallingSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarshallingTraverseContext
    Parent class for all classes that traverse POJOs.
    MarshallingTraverseContext.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarshallingTraverseSession
    ContextSession that lives for the duration of a single use of MarshallingTraverseContext.
    MarshallingTraverseSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    UriResolver
    Class used to create absolute and root-relative URIs based on your current URI 'location' and rules about how to make such resolutions.

    Identifies what relative URIs are relative to.
    UriResolution
    Identifies the possible types of URL resolution.
